# Example .env file with various secrets — used as a test fixture for lxredact.
# All values below are FAKE and for testing purposes only.

# OpenAI-style API key
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz1234567890ABCD

# Anthropic key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-api03-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz1234567890ABCD

# AWS credentials
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE1234
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY

# Database connection string with embedded password
DATABASE_URL=postgres://admin:s3cr3t_db_p4ssw0rd@db.internal/production

# GitHub personal access token
GH_TOKEN=ghp_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ1234567890ab

# JWT bearer token (fake)
BEARER_TOKEN=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIiwibmFtZSI6IkpvaG4gRG9lIn0.SflKxwRJSMeKKF2QT4fwpMeJf36POk6yJV_adQssw5c

# Generic password field
app_password=Qw7k@PmRn!TvXs91

# Email address (PII)
contact_email=alice.smith@example.com

# RSA private key block
PRIVATE_KEY=-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
MIIEpAIBAAKCAQEA0Z3VS5JJcds3xHn/ygWep4QFZPPQ==
-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----

# Clean fields (should NOT be redacted)
APP_NAME=my-cool-app
PORT=8080
LOG_LEVEL=info
ENVIRONMENT=production
